ip_outcome_note: suspected_ip was empty string — no IP verification task.

trivia_bullets.text: Card name echoes classic horror-movie audience instructions and Duskmourn's explicit 'Survival' archetype — fragile House inhabitants who must avoid detection. The set tracks Survivor as a named creature type and design theme.
sources: Wizards of the Coast: 'Duskmourn: House of Horror Mechanics'
Wizards of the Coast: 'Top of the Duskmourning, Part 1'

trivia_bullets.text: Costs {1}{U}, Aura. Tap-locks the enchanted creature permanently (no untap step). Activated ability {4}{U}{U} shuffles the creature away and manifests dread — removal plus a 2/2 body with flip potential. EDHREC rank 17,079; limited Commander adoption.
sources: Wizards of the Coast: 'Duskmourn: House of Horror Mechanics'

trivia_bullets.text: No flavor text. Art by Josu Hernaiz. Has a showcase/extended alternate art print at collector number 291 in DSK, same artist.

Manifest Dread is Duskmourn's upgrade to the original Manifest keyword from Fate Reforged (2015). Key improvement: you look at the top two cards, choose one to manifest, put the other in the graveyard — adding selection and graveyard synergy absent from the original.
sources: Wizards of the Coast: 'Duskmourn: House of Horror Mechanics'
CoolStuffInc: 'The Mechanics of Duskmourn: Manifest Dread' (via WebSearch snippet)

related_cards.note: Standalone spell version of the keyword in the activated ability
